description: Update the architectural floorplan at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf to include safety elements on a new layer named 'SAFETY' (Color: Red, Line Width: 0.50mm). The safety elements must include an evacuation route path from (300, 300) via (300, 600) to (800, 600), a 'You Are Here' circle (radius 25) at (300, 300), and a 50x50 square fire extinguisher symbol centered at (500, 300). Include text labels 'YOU ARE HERE', 'EXIT', and 'FE' near their corresponding symbols. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/evacuation_plan.dxf.
